meta.title: Whisper STT
meta.description: Transcribe audio using Whisper speech-to-text service

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: Trigger Whisper STT via webhook. Expected JSON: { audio (base64), audio_path (file path), language?, model?, response_format?, api_key? } or header X-API-Key. Set WHISPER_API_KEY env var to enable auth. If WHISPER_API_KEY is unset, auth is disabled (documented behavior).

nodes.name: Validate Input
nodes.notes: Validate inputs: audio/audio_path (at least one required), language whitelist, model whitelist, response format whitelist, and path traversal protection. Timing-safe API key comparison (256-char MAX_LEN, no length leak, header only - X-API-Key). Null byte detection uses proper null byte \x00.

nodes.name: Check Valid
nodes.notes: Branch based on validation result (valid=true → proceed to Whisper, valid=false → error response)

nodes.name: Prepare Audio
nodes.notes: Read audio file from audio_path (if provided) and attach binary data for HTTP Request multipart body. Converts file to base64 and adds to item.binary.audio.

nodes.name: Whisper STT Request
nodes.notes: Forward validated inputs to Whisper STT service with multipart/form-data. Audio binary data attached via 'file' field. 100MB max response, 5 min timeout.

nodes.name: Success Response
nodes.notes: Return successful response with transcribed text preview
